zh.lifeSummary: 當Rebecca Butler於1664年出生在美國康乃狄克州哈特福德哈特福德時，她的父親Thomas Butler27歲，母親Sarah Stone29歲。她於從1685年1月到1685年12月與Cornelius Hurlbut在布利提申 可隆尼亞爾 亞美利加康涅狄格州哈特福德維瑟斯費爾德結婚。他們至少是2個兒子的父母。她去世於1751年8月9日在美國康乃狄克州利其費爾德伍德伯里享年87歲，埋葬在美國康乃狄克州哈特福德維瑟斯費爾德。

zh-hans.lifeSummary: 当Rebecca Butler于1664年出生在美国康涅狄格州哈特福德哈特福德时，她的父亲Thomas Butler27岁，母亲Sarah Stone29岁。她于从1685年1月到1685年12月与Cornelius Hurlbut在布利提申 可隆尼亞爾 亞美利加康涅狄格州哈特福德維瑟斯費爾德结婚。他们至少是2个儿子的父母。她去世于1751年8月9日在美国康涅狄格州利其費爾德伍德伯里享年87岁，埋葬在美国康涅狄格州哈特福德維瑟斯費爾德。

nameMeanings.name: Butler
nameMeanings.attribution: Dictionary of American Family Names © Patrick Hanks 2003, 2006.
meanings: English: from a word that originally denoted a wine steward, usually the chief servant of a medieval household, from Norman French butuiller (Old French bouteillier, Latin buticularius, from buticula ‘bottle’). In the large households of royalty and the most powerful nobility, the title came to denote an officer of high rank and responsibility, only nominally concerned with the supply of wine, if at all. As well as being widespread in England, this is also the surname of an important Irish family, descended from Theobald FitzWalter, who was appointed Chief Butler of Ireland by King Henry II in 1177. It is Gaelicized as de Buitléir.

English: occasionally perhaps an occupational name from Middle English boteler ‘maker of bottles (usually of leather)’, a derivative of Middle English botel, Old French bo(u)teille ‘bottle’ and synonymous with Botelmaker.
Americanized form of French   Bouthillier   (see   Bouteiller  ).

variants.name: Buttler
meanings: English (of Norman origin): variant of   Butler  .
German: occupational name for a village tavern owner, from French bouteillier ‘butler’.
Americanized form of German Buttlar: habitational name from a place so named in Thuringia.

variants.name: Bouthillier
meanings: Some characteristic forenames:  French Andre, Armand, Jacques, Normand, Philippe, Yves.
French: variant of   Bouteiller  . This name is sometimes Americanized as   Butler  . Compare   Boutilier  .

nameMeanings.name: Rebecca
nameMeanings.attribution: Dictionary of First Names © Patrick Hanks and Flavia Hodges 1990, 2003, 2006.
meanings: Biblical name, from the Latin form of the Hebrew name Rebekah, borne by the wife of Isaac, who was the mother of Esau and Jacob (Genesis 24–27). The Hebrew root occurs in the Bible only in the vocabulary word marbek ‘cattle stall’, and its connection with the name is doubtful. In any case, Rebecca was Aramean, and the name probably has a source in Aramaic. It has always been common as a Jewish name; in England and elsewhere it began to be used also by Christians from the 14th century onwards and especially at the time of the Reformation, when Old Testament names became popular. It was very common among the Puritans in the 17th century, and has enjoyed a tremendous vogue in England since the latter part of the 20th century, among people of many different creeds. In Scotland this is found as an Anglicized form of Beathag .

en.lifeSummary: When Rebecca Butler was born in 1664, in Hartford, Hartford, Connecticut, United States, her father, Thomas Butler, was 27 and her mother, Sarah Stone, was 29. She married Cornelius Hurlbut from January 1685 to December 1685, in Wethersfield, Hartford, Connecticut Colony, British Colonial America. They were the parents of at least 2 sons. She died on 9 August 1751, in Woodbury, Litchfield, Connecticut, United States, at the age of 87, and was buried in Wethersfield, Hartford, Connecticut, United States.

fr.lifeSummary: Lorsque Rebecca Butler est née en 1664, à Hartford, Hartford, Connecticut, États-Unis, son père, Thomas Butler, avait 27 ans et sa mère, Sarah Stone, avait 29 ans. Elle a épousé Cornelius Hurlbut du janvier 1685 au décembre 1685, à Wethersfield, Hartford, Connecticut Colony, Amérique coloniale britannique. Ils ont eu au moins 2 fils. Elle est décédée le 9 août 1751, à Woodbury, Litchfield, Connecticut, États-Unis, à l’âge de 87 ans, et a été enterrée à Wethersfield, Hartford, Connecticut, États-Unis.

de.lifeSummary: Als Rebecca Butler 1664 in Hartford, Hartford, Connecticut, Vereinigte Staaten geboren wurde, war ihr Vater Thomas Butler 27 und ihre Mutter Sarah Stone 29. Sie hat von Januar 1685 bis Dezember 1685 in Wethersfield, Hartford, Connecticut Colony, British Colonial America Cornelius Hurlbut geheiratet. Sie hatten mindestens 2 Söhne. Sie starb am 9. August 1751 im Alter von 87 Jahren in Woodbury, Litchfield, Connecticut, Vereinigte Staaten und wurde in Wethersfield, Hartford, Connecticut, Vereinigte Staaten begraben.

it.lifeSummary: Quando Rebecca Butler è nata il nel 1664 nel Hartford, Hartford, Connecticut, Stati Uniti d'America, sua padre, Thomas Butler, aveva 27 anni e sua madre, Sarah Stone, aveva 29 anni. Lei sposato Cornelius Hurlbut da gennaio 1685 a dicembre 1685, nel Wethersfield, Hartford, Connecticut Colony, British Colonial America. Erano genitori di almeno 2 figli. Morì il 9 agosto 1751, nel Woodbury, Litchfield, Connecticut, Stati Uniti d'America, all'età di 87 anni, e fu sepolta a Wethersfield, Hartford, Connecticut, Stati Uniti d'America.

ja.lifeSummary: Rebecca Butlerが1664年にアメリカ合衆国コネチカット州ハートフォードハートフォードで生まれた時，父Thomas Butlerは27歳，母Sarah Stoneは29歳であった。から1685年1月まで1685年12月にイギリス植民地アメリカコネチカット州ハートフォードウエスエルスフィールドでCornelius Hurlbutと結婚した。彼らは少なくとも2人の息子の親であった。彼女は1751年8月9日にアメリカ合衆国コネチカット州リトチフィールドウッドブリーで87歳で死去し，アメリカ合衆国コネチカット州ハートフォードウエスエルスフィールドにて埋葬された。

ko.lifeSummary: Rebecca Butler(이)가 1664년 미국 코네티컷 주 하트퍼드 하트퍼드에서 태어났을 때, 그녀의 아버지 Thomas Butler(은)는 27세였고, 그녀의 어머니 Sarah Stone(은)는 29세였다. 그녀는 1685년 1월 부터 1685년 12월 까지 브리티시 콜론이앨 어머릭아 코네티컷 주 하트퍼드 w더스필드에서 Cornelius Hurlbut(와)과 결혼했다. 그들은 적어도 두 명의 아들을 두었다. 그녀는 1751년 8월 9일 미국 코네티컷 주 리트ch필드 우드버이에서 87세의 나이로 사망했으며 미국 코네티컷 주 하트퍼드 w더스필드에 묻혔다.

pt.1685: de janeiro de 1685 a dezembro de 1685
pt.Woodbury, Litchfield, Colony of Connecti: Woodbury, Litchfield, Conecticute, Estados Unidos da América
pt.Hartford, Hartford, Connecticut Colony,: Hartford, Hartford, Conecticute, British Colonial America

pt.lifeSummary: Quando Rebecca Butler nasceu em 1664, em Hartford, Hartford, Conecticute, Estados Unidos da América, seu pai, Thomas Butler, tinha 27 anos e sua mãe, Sarah Stone, tinha 29 anos. Ela casou-se com Cornelius Hurlbut de janeiro de 1685 a dezembro de 1685, em Wethersfield, Hartford, Conecticute, British Colonial America. Eles tiveram pelo menos 2 filhos. Ela faleceu em 9 de agosto de 1751, em Woodbury, Litchfield, Conecticute, Estados Unidos da América, com 87 anos, e foi sepultada em Wethersfield, Hartford, Conecticute, Estados Unidos da América.

ru.lifeSummary: Когда Rebecca Butler родилась в 1664 г. в местности хартфорд, хартфорд, Коннектикут, Соединенные штаты, её отцу по имени Thomas Butler было 27 лет, а матери, которую звали Sarah Stone, 29. Она вышла замуж за человека по имени Cornelius Hurlbut с январь 1685 по декабрь 1685 в местности ветирсфиелд, хартфорд, Коннектикут, бритиш колоняль амирика. У них было по крайней мере 2 сына. Она умерла 9 августа 1751 г. в местности вудбури, личфиелд, Коннектикут, Соединенные штаты в возрасте 87 лет и была похоронена в местности ветирсфиелд, хартфорд, Коннектикут, Соединенные штаты.

es.lifeSummary: Cuando Rebecca Butler nació en 1664, en Hartford, Hartford, Connecticut, Estados Unidos, su papá, Thomas Butler, tenía 27 años y su mamá, Sarah Stone, tenía 29 años. Se casó con Cornelius Hurlbut desde enero de 1685 hasta diciembre de 1685, en Wethersfield, Hartford, Connecticut Colony, British Colonial America. Fueron padres de por lo menos 2 hijos. Murió el 9 de agosto de 1751, en Woodbury, Litchfield, Connecticut, Estados Unidos, a la edad de 87 años, y fue sepultada en Wethersfield, Hartford, Connecticut, Estados Unidos.
